login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Please enter your details to access the system
login.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
login.facebookNotReady: Facebook SDK isn't ready yet, please try again in a moment

register.title: Create a Driver Account
register.subtitle: Sign up to enjoy a smarter parking experience
register.personalInfoSubtitle: Please fill in accurate information so we can assist you better
register.phoneInvalid: Phone number must have 10 digits and start with 0
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.confirmPasswordMismatch: Password and confirmation do not match
register.acceptTermsRequired: Please accept the terms of service to continue
register.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please check your email to verify your account.
register.registerFailedDefault: Registration failed, please check your information again.
register.approvalNoticeBody: After registering, your account will be reviewed by the Management Board. You'll be notified of the result by phone or email. The review process may take 1–2 business days.

verifyEmail.pendingBody: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please click the link to complete your registration.
verifyEmail.resendFailed: Failed to resend the email, please try again later
verifyEmail.resendSuccessNew: A new verification email has been sent!
verifyEmail.noEmailFound: No email to verify was found, please register again
verifyEmail.successBody: Your account has been activated. You can sign in now.
verifyEmail.errorBody: This link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.

hero.subtitle: An automated, safe, and efficient management solution for parking operators, and an easier parking experience for every resident and staff member.
hero.dailyEntries: Over {{count}} entries and exits every day

stats.title: Parking Status Overview
stats.subtitle: Real-time tracking helps you stay on top of the building's current parking status.

vehicles.title: Supported Vehicles
vehicles.subtitle: A specialized program optimized for each vehicle type when registering.

pricing.title: Official Pricing
pricing.subtitle: We're a professional operator, not a budget lot. Pricing is calculated automatically and flexibly by the hour/minute through the management system.
pricing.footnote: *Prices may vary during holidays or based on parking duration.

guidelines.title: Operating Rules & Guidelines
guidelines.intro: To ensure safety and smooth operation of the building, please follow the parking facility's rules...
guidelines.cameraNotice: The facility is monitored 24/7 by smart AI cameras and an automatic fire suppression system.

items.speedLimit: Observe the maximum speed limit of 10km/h within the parking area.
items.parkingLines: Park within the marked lines and avoid blocking shared walkways or other vehicles.
items.turnOffEngine: Turn off your engine immediately after parking, and don't leave flammable materials in your vehicle.
items.payOnTime: Pay parking fees on time for monthly passes; for single visits, pay before exiting.
items.noSmoking: Smoking, littering, and disorderly conduct are prohibited throughout the parking area.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.greeting: Hi {{name}}, here is your system overview.

users.title: User management
users.notFoundHint: Try changing the filters or search term.
users.emailCantChange: Email cannot be changed after the account is created.
users.dateHint: Staff must be at least 18 at the hire date. You can click the calendar or type the date directly.
users.systemCantEdit: This is a system account (walk-in guest) and cannot be edited.
users.systemCantLock: This is a system account (walk-in guest) and cannot be locked.
users.validateDatesRequired: Staff/Manager roles require a date of birth and hire date.
users.validateUnder18: The user must be at least 18 at the hire date to hold a Staff/Manager role.
users.errLoad: Could not load the user list

parkingConfig.title: Parking Setup
parkingConfig.capacityInfo: Each zone has a maximum capacity (the number you set) and an actual slot count (slots already created). A 5 / 10 bar means 5 slots created out of a maximum of 10. To add a slot, click Add slot; when full, raise the zone capacity first.
parkingConfig.noBuildingsHint: Create a building on the Facilities page first, then come back here.
parkingConfig.selectBuildingHint: Manage floors, zones and slots inside the selected building.
parkingConfig.noZones: This floor has no zones yet.
parkingConfig.vehicleCantChange: Cannot change if the zone already has slots of another type.
parkingConfig.zoneHint: Maximum capacity is the slot limit. Create actual slots in "Manage slots" after saving the zone.
parkingConfig.confirmDeleteFloor: Delete {{name}}? The floor must have no zones inside.
parkingConfig.confirmDeleteZone: Delete zone "{{name}}"? The zone must have no slots inside.
parkingConfig.noSlotsHint: Use the "Add one slot" or "Add in bulk" tab.
parkingConfig.slotCodeHint: The code must be unique system-wide. Vehicle type is auto-assigned by the zone ({{vehicle}}).
parkingConfig.zoneFull: Zone is full ({{actual}}/{{total}}). Raise the capacity via "Edit zone" before adding.
parkingConfig.bulkPreviewHint: Enter a prefix and number range to preview.

errors.SLOT_CODE_TOO_LONG: Slot code must be at most 20 characters.
errors.ZONE_CAPACITY_FULL: The zone is full. Raise the capacity before adding slots.
errors.VEHICLE_TYPE_MISMATCH: The slot's vehicle type must match the zone's allowed type.
errors.SLOT_IN_USE: Cannot delete a slot that is occupied or reserved.
errors.SLOT_HAS_ACTIVE_SESSION: The slot has an active parking session and cannot be deleted.
errors.SLOT_HAS_RESERVATION: The slot has an active reservation and cannot be deleted.
errors.SLOT_HAS_HISTORY: The slot has parking history. Set it to Blocked instead of deleting.
errors.ZONE_HAS_SLOTS: Cannot delete the zone because it still has slots.
errors.ZONE_NAME_EXISTS: Zone name already exists on this floor.
errors.ZONE_HAS_OTHER_VEHICLE_SLOTS: Cannot change the vehicle type because the zone has slots of another type.
errors.TOTAL_SLOTS_BELOW_ACTUAL: The new capacity is below the actual slot count. Remove some slots first.
errors.FLOOR_HAS_ZONES: Cannot delete the floor because it still has zones.
errors.FLOOR_NAME_EXISTS: Floor name already exists in this building.
errors.BUILDING_HAS_FLOORS: Cannot delete the building because it still has floors.
errors.DOB_HIREDATE_REQUIRED: Staff/Manager roles require a date of birth and hire date.
errors.UNDER_MIN_AGE: The user is under 18 at the hire date.
errors.SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_PROTECTED: This is a system account and cannot be edited or have its role changed.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired, please sign in again.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired, please sign in again.

driverHome.title: Home
driverHome.welcomeBack: Welcome back. Here is the parking overview.

workflows.noBookingDesc: Reserve a great spot for your next trip today.
workflows.noSessionDesc: A parking session will automatically appear when you check-in.
